name: manage-cli
description: Simple CLI management for OpenCLI registry

scripts.test:database: node -e "import('./src/lib/database-manager.mjs').then(({DatabaseCLIManager}) => { const db = new DatabaseCLIManager(); db.testConnection().then(r => console.log(r.success ? '✅ Database OK' : '❌ Database Failed')); })"
